findings.description: Source unit u_0003 (accessibility/contrast guidance with GENERAL-tagged concrete governance facets: min icon render size 32×32px in email, default Brand Blue stroke on light backgrounds) is not represented by either candidate rule. This is a distinct iconography rule about legibility/accessibility that was dropped from clustering entirely.

payload.statement: Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences; default to Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.

findings.description: The color-palette rule captures 'only within brand palette' but omits the GENERAL governance facet from u_0003 specifying a default stroke color (Brand Blue) on light backgrounds, which directly qualifies how palette colors are applied to icon strokes. This measurable default should be linked or added as a governance facet rather than left unclustered.
